sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49579" key="qutei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θῠτ-εῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θύω</foreign> A) <sense id="n49579.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">place for sacrificing</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg003.perseus-grc1:122" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.122</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
